economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Hul'qumi'num Fisheries Limited Partnership, Tsu Holdings LP, BC First Nations Gaming General Partner Inc., and BC First Nations Gaming Limited Partnership. COVID-19 pandemic noted as potential economic risk.
notes: Audit is qualified because financial information for related government business enterprises and partnerships was not available and not included in consolidated statements. Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Hul'qumi'num Fisheries LP, BC First Nations Gaming General Partner Inc., BC First Nations Gaming Limited Partnership. Prior year restatement applied due to adoption of PSAS 3070 for GBE investments, increasing prior surplus by $98,300. Tsu Holdings LP had a $1,005,385 advance from the First Nation recorded as due from related party. No remuneration schedule was included in the financial statements. expenses_housing combines Band Housing ($38,652) and Social Housing ($67,125). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,120,197 + FNHA $379,853 + Province of BC $244,440 + New Relationship Trust $44,100 + BC Aboriginal Child Care Society $71,500 + First Peoples Heritage $117,358 + Kwumut Lelum $57,000 + Treaty negotiation support $150,000 = $2,184,448 less deferred revenue net adjustments; used sum of identified government sources at face value.
